info.title: Notification Service
info.description:
Notification Service

 **Last update**: 21 ene 26, 04:11 p. m.

get.summary: Get an access token for new websocket connection
get.description: Retrieves a new access token if user has valid credentials.

get.summary: Get a list of Connections with their subscriptions
API to get a default event by id
get.description: **IMPORTANT**: Although `janis-client` header is requested, the data is not retrieved by client

put.summary: API to update a default event
put.description: **IMPORTANT**: Although `janis-client` header is requested, the data is not retrieved by client

get.summary: API to get a list of default events
get.description: **IMPORTANT**: Although `janis-client` header is requested, the data is not retrieved by client

post.summary: API to create a new default event
post.description: **IMPORTANT**: Although `janis-client` header is requested, the data is not retrieved by client

get.summary: API to get a event by id
API to get a list of events

post.description: Subscribes to receive notifications for the specified events.

get.summary: Get a list of Subscriptions by event

post.description: Unsubscribes to stop receiving notifications from the specified events.

get.summary: Get detailed information about a specific user
get.description: Retrieve comprehensive connection details for a specific user

404.description: User not found or does not belong to this client

get.summary: Get a list of connected users
get.description: Retrieve a list of users connected to the current client with their connection details

post.description: Listener for events related to the updating of a user's ID

id.name: id
id.description: The unique identifier of the item

ConnectionFilters.name: filters
ConnectionFilters.description: The filters to apply to the list

notificationTypes.description: The type of connections to filter by.

connectionIds.description: The connectionIds to filter by. A comma separated string  will also be accepted. `REQUIRED`

id.description: The unique identifier of the item

dateModified.description: The date of the last modification

userModified.description: The ID of the user who last modified the item

eventKey.description: The key that identifies the event

platforms.description: The platforms where the notification can be delivered

filters.description: Dynamic filters used to target notifications

useActiveWarehouseInFilter.description: Whether to use the user's active warehouse automatically for filtering

defaultNotificationTranslations.description: Default translation texts used when no language-specific translation is provided

language.description: ISO language code of the translation

allOf.description: The id of the default event
